LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-20-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SOLOMON ENOBABOR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT FAILS TO PROVIDE A MEET AND CONFER DECLARATION IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JUNE 20, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Apperances (via Zoom videoconference):
Defendant SOLOMON ENOBABOR, in pro per present (tel: 415-324-7463).

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SOLOMON ENOBABOR's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Defendant fails to provide a meet and confer declaration in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by June 20, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
